hotels.name: Tower Guest House
hotels.description_fr:
Award-winner of Visit York Tourism Awards 2019 and 2017 B&B of the Year, Tower Guest House offers boutique-style accommodation in a grand Victorian town house in York, about 1 mile from York Minster and The Shambles. With free WiFi and free onsite parking, the property is just 11 minutes' drive from York Racecourse.
The guest house has 8 luxurious en suite rooms with high-quality bedding to help ensure a restful night's sleep. Each also benefits from a flat-screen TV. Some rooms boast a four-poster bed or a super king-size bed. Guests can request to have champagne, chocolates, or flowers placed in the room prior to arrival. There is air-conditioning throughout the property.
Continental breakfast is served in the bright breakfast room each morning.

hotels.name: Ascot House
hotels.description_fr:
Just 10 minutes' travel by bus from York Railway Station, Ascot House is a 15-minute walk from York Minster. It offers award-winning breakfasts, elegant bedrooms, free WiFi, and free parking.

Bedrooms at Ascot House hotel feature TVs and tea/coffee making facilities. Some rooms have a four-poster or canopy bed, and all benefit from an en suite bathroom.

The dining room offers a range of delicious breakfast options including traditional English, vegetarian and continental. The lounge has a comfortable seating area and a TV.

There is a bus stop outside of Ascot House, which has regular services to the city centre. York boasts many historical sites including Cliffords Tower, York Minster and the Medieval Walls.

Les couples apprécient particulièrement l'emplacement de cet établissement.

There is a bus stop outside of Ascot House, which has regular services to the city centre. York boasts many historical sites including Cliffords Tower, York Minster and the Medieval Walls.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it 9.

hotels.name: Minster Walk Guesthouse
hotels.description_fr:
Situé à seulement 300 mètres de la cathédrale de York, le Minster Walk Guest House est une charmante auberge de 300 ans dotée d'une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite.

Décorées individuellement, les chambres disposent d'une télévision à écran plat, de linge de lit en coton égyptien et d'un plateau/bouilloire. Certaines chambres offrent une vue sur la cathédrale de York. Leur salle de bains privative est pourvue d'articles de toilette de luxe.

Des rafraîchissements et des friandises sont disponibles gratuitement à tout moment dans le salon.

Tous nos prix comprennent notre expérience de petit-déjeuner Minster Walk fraîchement préparé à votre commande.
hotels.description_en:
Situated just 300 metres from York Minster, Minster Walk Guest House is a charming 300-year old coaching inn with free WiFi.

The individually designed rooms have a flat-screen TVs, Egyptian cotton bed linen, and tea and coffee making facilities. Some rooms have views of York Minster. Each offers en-suite facilities with luxury toiletries.

Complementary refreshments and sweet treats are available at all times in the guest lounge.

All our room prices include our Minster Walk Breakfast Experience freshly prepared to your order.

Whilst enjoying a quiet position, the privately owned property looks onto the city walls and is just 5 minutes' stroll from the Shambles. York Railway Station can be reached within a 10-minute walk.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it 9.
hotels.description_es:
El Minster Walk Guest House es una encantadora posada de 300 años de antigüedad con WiFi gratuita situada a solo 300 metros de la catedral de York.

Las habitaciones presentan un diseño individual y disponen de TV de pantalla plana, ropa de cama de algodón egipcio y set de té y café. Algunas habitaciones tienen vistas a la catedral de York. Todas disponen de baño con artículos de aseo de lujo.

En el salón se sirven refrescos y dulces gratuitos en todo momento.

Todos nuestros precios incluyen nuestro Minster Walk Desayuno Experiencia recién preparada a su pedido.

Este establecimiento de propiedad privada goza de una ubicación tranquila a solo 5 minutos a pie de los Shambles y ofrece vistas a las murallas de la ciudad. La estación de tren de York se encuentra a 10 minutos a pie.
